title: Sterling 901R SafeCan Key Rock-Secret Stash Hidden Storage
description: From the manufacturer Sterling offers a range of physical security hardware with an emphasis on quality and great value. Sterling is a brand of Burg-Wächter. Burg-Wächter are recognised for quality standards across our extensive range of locks, padlocks, safes, post boxes and access control solutions. Over 120 years security experience 10,000 individual product lines Sterling 901R SafeCan Rock Secret storage - Ideal for outside spare keys The Rock SafeCan is an authentic design that makes this perfect for hiding your spare key safely in place that no one would normally look. The product is recognised by Neighbourhood Watch groups and insurance companies as an excellent deterrent against theft. Perfect hiding place for keys Water resistant Hidden compartment Ideal for outside use Authentic Design Our rock SafeCan will not look out of place in your garden or your flower bed, its small discreet design is perfect for keeping that spare key hidden! Hidden Secret Storage Hidden on the underside is a useful storage area that measures 75mm x 32mm x 24mm, an ideal size for a spare house key or other small items.
